title: Number and names of arguments passed to a function should match its parameters
description: Ensures that the number and names of arguments passed to a function match the function's defined parameters.
message: Incorrect number or names of arguments passed to function
recommendation: Ensure that the number and names of arguments passed to a function match its defined parameters

noncompliant.code:
def test(a, b, c=1): print(len(locals()))
test(1, 2, 3, d=4)
noncompliant.description: Function receives more arguments than defined

compliant.code:
def test(a, b, c=1): print(len(locals()))
test(1, 2)

why_is_this_an_issue: Mismatched arguments can lead to unexpected behavior and errors, making the code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Update the function definition to match the arguments being passed or adjust the arguments being passed to match the function definition.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the function arguments match the defined parameters based on number and names.

metadata.title: Number and names of arguments passed to a function should match its parameters
